reference: My boyfriend was diagnosed with stomach cancer almost five years ago. He experiences stomach problems daily, with some days being worse than others. This morning, he woke up with a bruise on his right side above his waistline. He doesn't remember hitting anything. Should we be alarmed? What could cause this?
text: My boyfriend was diagnosed with stomach cancer almost five years ago. He experiences stomach problems daily, with some days being worse than others. This morning, he woke up with a bruise on his right side above his waistline. He doesn't remember hitting anything. Should we be alarmed? What could cause this?
